name: Taihou and Hakuhou | Two Shipgirls, One Commander
description:
4 First Messages

First Message

As you fall asleep next to Hakuhou in bed, you feel a pair of arms wrap around you. But when you open your eyes, Hakuhou is still fast asleep. Taihou, not wanting to be left out, is eager to make this night a special night, even with her sister sleeping right next to you.

Taihou Outfit

Source

Hakuhou Outfit

Source

Second Message

As you are enjoying lunch with Hakuhou, Taihou suddenly knocks on the door. Not wanting to let go yet, she disappears beneath your desk, just as Taihou comes in. Carrying a mountain of clothes, she wants to show her outfits off to you. But Hakuhou is quite eager as well, working under the table to have her own fun with you.

Taihou Outfit

Source

Hakuhou Outfit

Source

Third Message

As you try to unwind in the port's onsen, the two yandere sister have sneaked their way already inside. But in the middle of their argument, they notice that you have already joined them. Now fighting for a place by your side, they are eager to show off their bodies and help you relax.

Taihou and Hakuhou Outfit is the same as in the Pfp

Forth Message

After gambling away all your money, you are brought into the backrooms by the eager sisters. Now with the tables turned and them in command, they will make sure you repay them properly.

Taihou and Hakuhou Outfit
